title: NMS Wins AOGA’s Contractor of the Year for Safety Performance Award
summary: ANCHORAGE, Alaska – NANA is excited to announce that NANA Management Services (NMS) has received a 2021 Contractor of the Year for Safety Performance Award from the Alaska Oil & Gas Association (AOGA), sponsored by the Alaska Support Industry Alliance.
